Functions to compute distance, active calories, and resting calories based on steps, distance, and time.

# Purpose
This C header file declares three functions related to activity tracking. The function [`activity_private_compute_distance_mm`](<#activity_private_compute_distance_mm>) calculates the distance in millimeters based on the number of steps taken and the time in milliseconds. The function [`activity_private_compute_active_calories`](<#activity_private_compute_active_calories>) computes the active calories burned, given the distance in millimeters and the time in milliseconds. The function [`activity_private_compute_resting_calories`](<#activity_private_compute_resting_calories>) calculates the resting calories burned over a specified number of elapsed minutes. These functions are likely intended for use in a fitness or health monitoring application.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
